message:
refactor: run tests in workerd via @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers

12 test files (132 tests) now run in the real CF Workers runtime via
workerd, validating code works on the actual deployment target. Node
tests (DuckDB conformance, fixture I/O) remain in Node.

- Add vitest.workers.config.ts with @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers
- Split vitest.config.ts to only include Node-dependent tests
- Rewrite fragment-do.test.ts to use real DO bindings (runInDurableObject)
- Add test:workers and test:node scripts, test runs both
- Update CI to run workerd and node tests separately

files.patch:
@@ -29,8 +29,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build (WASM + TypeScript)
         run: pnpm build
 
-      - name: Unit tests
-        run: pnpm test
+      - name: Workerd tests (operators, DOs, decode — real CF Workers runtime)
+        run: pnpm test:workers
+
+      - name: Node tests (DuckDB conformance, fixtures)
+        run: pnpm test:node
 
   conformance:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -81,7 +84,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Post benchmark results to summary
         if: always()
         run: |
-          echo "## Operator Benchmarks — QueryMode (Miniflare) vs DuckDB (native)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## Operator Benchmarks — QueryMode (wrangler dev) vs DuckDB (native)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           cat /tmp/bench-output.txt >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

@@ -21,7 +21,9 @@
     "build": "pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:ts",
     "build:wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && cp zig-out/bin/querymode.wasm ../src/wasm/",
     "build:ts": "tsc && mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp src/wasm/querymode.wasm dist/wasm/",
-    "test": "vitest run",
+    "test": "vitest run -c vitest.workers.config.ts && vitest run",
+    "test:workers": "vitest run -c vitest.workers.config.ts",
+    "test:node": "vitest run",
     "test:watch": "vitest",
     "deploy": "pnpm run build && wrangler deploy",
     "wasm": "pnpm run build:wasm",
@@ -31,6 +33,7 @@
     "bench:local": "npx tsx scripts/bench-local.ts"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
+    "@cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers": "^0.12.20",
     "@cloudflare/workers-types": "^4.20250224.0",
     "@types/node": "^25.3.3",
     "duckdb": "^1.4.4",

@@ -21,6 +21,9 @@ importers:

         version: 4.3.6
     devDependencies:

       '@cloudflare/workers-types':
         specifier: ^4.20250224.0
         version: 4.20260301.1

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+import { defineWorkersConfig } from "@cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers/config";
+
+export default defineWorkersConfig({
+  test: {
+    include: ["src/**/*.test.ts"],
+    exclude: [
+      // These require native Node addons (duckdb) or disk fixture I/O (node:fs)
+      "src/operators-conformance.test.ts",
+      "src/conformance.test.ts",
+      "src/parquet-fixture.test.ts",
+      "src/manifest.test.ts",
+      "src/wasm-engine.integration.test.ts",
+      "src/query-do.integration.test.ts",
+      "node_modules/**",
+    ],
+    hookTimeout: 300_000,
+    testTimeout: 300_000,
+    poolOptions: {
+      workers: {
+        wrangler: { configPath: "./wrangler.toml" },
+      },
+    },
+  },
+});
